debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
⊢ D ≤ @DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB''

intro N hN
  have h₁ : N ∈ D := hN
  have h₂ : ∃ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ⊆ ⋃ N : {N : PersistenceSubmodule M // N ∈ D}, ⋃ (hN : N.val ∈ D), B N.val hN ∧ N = sSup B := by
    use B N hN
    constructor
    · -- Prove that B N hN is a subset of the union
      intro X hX
      -- Since X is in B N hN, we need to show it's in the union
      have h₃ : X ∈ B N hN := hX
      -- We can find N and hN such that X is in B N hN
      have h₄ : ∃ (N : {N : PersistenceSubmodule M // N.val ∈ D}) (hN : N.val ∈ D), X ∈ B N.val hN := by
        -- We use the fact that X is in B N hN and N ∈ D to find such N and hN
        refine' ⟨⟨N, h₁⟩, h₁, _⟩
        exact h₃
      -- Therefore, X is in the union
      rcases h₄ with ⟨⟨N, hN⟩, hN', hX'⟩
      simp_all [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      <;> aesop
    · -- Prove that N = sSup (B N hN)
      have h₃ : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N h₁
      exact h₃
  -- Extract the subset B from the existential statement
  rcases h₂ with ⟨B', hB'_subset, hB'_eq⟩
  -- Use B' to show that D is a refinement of the refinement
  refine' ⟨B', _, _⟩
  · -- Prove that B' is a subset of the refinement
    intro X hX
    -- Since B' is a subset of the union, X is in the refinement
    simp only [refinement.insthab] at *
    have h₃ : X ∈ B' := hX
    have h₄ : B' ⊆ ⋃ N : {N : PersistenceSubmodule M // N.val ∈ D}, ⋃ (hN : N.val ∈ D), B N.val hN := hB'_subset
    have h₅ : X ∈ ⋃ N : {N : PersistenceSubmodule M // N.val ∈ D}, ⋃ (hN : N.val ∈ D), B N.val hN := h₄ h₃
    simp only [refinement.insthab] at h₅ ⊢
    exact h₅
  · -- Prove that N = sSup B'
    have h₃ : N = sSup B' := hB'_eq
    exact h₃

by
  intro N hN
  use ⋃ (h : N ∈ D), B N h
  constructor
  · -- Prove that the union is a subset of the carrier of the refinement
    intro S hS
    simp only [DirectSumDecomposition.refinement.carrier, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
    aesop
  · -- Prove that N is the supremum of the union
    have h : N = sSup (⋃ (h : N ∈ D), B N h) := by
      have h₁ : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
      have h₂ : sSup (B N hN) = sSup (⋃ (h : N ∈ D), B N h) := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · -- Prove that sSup (B N hN) ≤ sSup (⋃ (h : N ∈ D), B N h)
          apply sSup_le_sSup
          · intro x hx
            simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
            exact ⟨hN, hx⟩
        · -- Prove that sSup (⋃ (h : N ∈ D), B N h) ≤ sSup (B N hN)
          apply sSup_le_sSup
          · intro x hx
            simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx
            rcases hx with ⟨h', hx'⟩
            have h₃ : B N h' ⊆ B N hN := by
              intro y hy
              have h₄ : N ∈ D := h'
              have h₅ : y ∈ B N h' := hy
              have h₆ : y ∈ B N hN := by
                -- Prove that y is in B N hN
                have h₇ : B N h' = B N hN := by
                  -- Prove that B N h' = B N hN
                  have h₈ : N ∈ D := h'
                  have h₉ : N ∈ D := hN
                  aesop
                rw [h₇]
                exact hy
              exact h₆
            have h₇ : x ∈ B N h' := hx'
            have h₈ : x ∈ B N hN := h₃ h₇
            exact h₈
      rw [h₁, h₂]
    simpa [h] using h

by
  intro N hN
  have h₁ : N ∈ D.carrier := hN
  have h₂ : ∃ (s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)), s ⊆ (∀ (X : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)), Set.Nonempty X → sSupIndep X → sSup (X) = N → s = X) ∧ sSup (s) = N := by
    classical
    use {N}
    constructor
    · intro X hX_nonempty hX_ind hX_ssup
      have h₃ : sSup X = N := hX_ssup
      have h₄ : sSupIndep X := hX_ind
      have h₅ : N ∈ D.carrier := hN
      have h₆ : N ∈ X := by
        by_contra h
        have h₇ : sSup X ⊑ N := by
          have h₈ : sSup X ⊑ sSup {N} := by
            apply sSup_mono
            intro Y _X
            have h₉ : Y ⊑ sSup X := by
              apply le_sSup
              exact _X
            have h₁₀ : Y ⊑ N := by
              rw [h₃] at h₉
              exact h₉
            exact h₁₀
          have h₉ : sSup {N} = N := by simp
          rw [h₉] at h₈
          exact h₈
        have h₈ : sSup X < N := by
          have h₉ : sSup X ⊑ N := h₇
          have h₁₀ : sSup X ≠ N := by
            intro h_eq
            have h₁₁ : N ∈ X := by
              have h₁₂ : sSup X = N := by simp_all
              have h₁₃ : N ∈ X := by
                by_contra h₁₄
                have h₁₅ : sSup X < N := by
                  have h₁₆ : sSup X ⊑ N := sSup_mono (fun Y _X => by
                    have h₁₇ : Y ⊑ sSup X := le_sSup _X
                    have h₁₈ : Y ⊑ N := by
                      simp_all [sSup_mono]
                      <;>
                      simp_all [sSup_mono]
                      <;>
                      simp_all [sSup_mono]
                    exact h₁₈) (by simp [h₁] : ({N} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) ⊆ D.carrier)
                  have h₁₇ : sSup {N} = N := by simp
                  have h₁₈ : sSup X < sSup {N} := by
                    calc
                      sSup X ⊑ sSup X := le_refl _
                      _ < N := by simp_all
                      _ = sSup {N} := by simp
                  have h₁₉ : sSup {N} = N := by simp
                  rw [h₁₉] at *
                  simp_all
                simp_all
              exact h₁₃
            simp_all
          have h₁₁ : sSup X < N := by
            have h₁₂ : sSup X ⊑ N := h₇
            have h₁₃ : sSup X ≠ N := h₁₀
            have h₁₄ : sSup X < N := by
              contrapose! h₁₃
              exact le_antisymm h₁₂ (le_of_not_gt (fun h₁₅ => by
                simp_all [lt_irrefl]
                <;>
                simp_all [lt_irrefl]
              ))
            exact h₁₄
          exact h₁₁
        have h₉ : sSup X < N := h₈
        have h₁₀ : sSup X = N := h₃
        simp_all [lt_irrefl]
      have h₁₁ : X = {N} := by
        apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr
        constructor
        · exact h₆
        · intro Y hY
          have h₁₂ : Y ⊑ N := by
            have h₁₃ : Y ⊑ sSup X := by apply le_sSup hY
            have h₁₄ : sSup X = N := h₃
            rw [h₁₄] at h₁₃
            exact h₁₃
          have h₁₃ : N ⊑ Y := by
            have h₁₄ : N ⊑ sSup X := by
              rw [h₃]
              <;> simp [le_rfl]
            have h₁₅ : Y ∈ X := hY
            have h₁₆ : Y ⊑ sSup X := le_sSup h₁₅
            have h₁₇ : Y ⊑ N := by
              have h₁₈ : Y ⊑ sSup X := le_sSup h₁₅
              have h₁₉ : sSup X = N := h₃
              rw [h₁₉] at h₁₈
              exact h₁₈
            have h₂₀ : N ⊑ sSup X := by
              rw [h₃]
              <;> simp [le_rfl]
            have h₂₁ : N ⊑ Y := by
              by_contra h₂₂

  intro N hN
  have h₁ : N ∈ D := hN
  refine' ⟨B N h₁, ?_, _⟩
  · intro X hX
    have h₂ : X ∈ (⋃ N : Type, ⋃ (hN : ), B N hN) := by
      -- We need to show that X is in the union of all decompositions of the components of D
      -- Since X is in B N h₁, it is in the union over N and hN
      have h₃ : X ∈ B N h₁ := hX
      have h₄ : X ∈ (⋃ (hN : ), B N h₁) := by
        exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨h₁, h₃⟩
      have h₅ : (⋃ (hN : ), B N h₁) ⊆ (⋃ N : Type, ⋃ (hN : ), B N hN) := by
        intro Y hY

  intro N hN
  have h1 : B N hN ⊆ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by
